title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 162.661 - Annual report of the board
text:
162.661.  Annual report of the board. — The board of education shall, as soon as practicable after the close of each school year, cause to be printed and published a report of the condition of the public schools under its charge, and of all the property under its control, with a full and accurate account of all the receipts and expenditures of the board during the preceding year, and of the condition of all investments.
(L. 1963 p. 200 § 3-66) 
(Source: RSMo 1959 § 165.650)
